title: Jr-Chang Chen
text: Home * People * Jr-Chang Chen Jr-Chang Chen Jr-Chang Chen , a Taiwanese computer scientist, game researcher and programmer, and associate professor at Chung Yuan Christian University in Zhongli City , Taoyuan County . Jr-Chang Chen received his B.Sc., M.Sc., and Ph.D. degrees in CS and information engineering from National Taiwan University , in 1996, 1998, and 2005, respectively [1] . He is co-author of the Chinese Chess programs and multiple gold medal winners at Computer Olympiads , Contemplation , ELP , and more recently, Chimo [2] , the Shogi program EVG , and the Nurikabe puzzle program Enigma [3] .
